decision_summary.rationale: The instance is consistently oversized, with a p95 CPU utilization of 5.2%, and downsizing to a c5.xlarge instance will maintain a projected CPU utilization of 10.4% while reducing costs.

llm_response.technical_explanation: The instance i-a017, batch-worker-oversized-01, has been identified as oversized based on its CPU utilization over the past 30 days. With a p95 CPU utilization of 5.2%, it is clear that the current instance type c5.2xlarge is not being fully utilized. The recommended instance type c5.xlarge is expected to maintain a projected CPU utilization of 10.4%, which is within a reasonable range for efficient resource usage. This downsizing will result in significant cost savings without compromising the instance's performance.

failed_checks.check_name: Ensure all data stored in the Launch configuration or instance Elastic Blocks Store is securely encrypted

raw.url: Add an api key '--bc-api-key <api-key>' to see more detailed insights via https://bridgecrew.cloud

nl_quality.name: nl_quality
nl_quality.details: The report covers basic CPU metrics and the c5.xlarge recommendation but entirely omits the RAM analysis, the c5.large two-step downsize opportunity, and the critique that stopping at c5.xlarge leaves ~$62/month of additional savings on the table — the core insight of the SUBOPTIMAL verdict.
